evals.name: pr-benchmark-request
evals.prompt: Can you benchmark PR https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/121223 to check for performance impact?
evals.expected_output: Should follow Workflow 1 (PR Benchmark Validation). Should write a BenchmarkDotNet benchmark targeting the changed code and invoke @EgorBot to run it on the PR.

assertions.name: uses-workflow-1
assertions.description: Follows the PR benchmark validation workflow

assertions.name: writes-benchmark
assertions.description: Creates or references a BenchmarkDotNet benchmark

assertions.name: invokes-bot
assertions.description: Invokes EgorBot or MihuBot to run the benchmark

evals.name: perf-regression-autobot
evals.expected_output: Should follow Workflow 2 (Regression Investigation). Should identify baseline/compare commits from the performanceautofiler report, assess severity from the Test/Base ratio, and attempt validation or bisection.

assertions.name: uses-workflow-2
assertions.description: Follows the regression investigation workflow

assertions.name: identifies-commits
assertions.description: Identifies or references baseline/compare commits from the bot report

assertions.name: assesses-severity
assertions.description: Assesses the regression severity using the ratio

evals.name: jit-diff-request
evals.prompt: Can you generate JIT diffs for my PR that changes the JIT compiler?
evals.expected_output: Should follow Workflow 3 (JIT Diff Analysis). Should invoke @MihuBot to generate JIT diffs and explain how to interpret the results.

assertions.name: uses-mihubot
assertions.description: Invokes MihuBot for JIT diffs

assertions.name: mentions-jit-diffs
assertions.description: References JIT diff generation

evals.name: benchmark-with-corerun
evals.prompt: How do I benchmark my local runtime changes against the main branch?
evals.expected_output: Should explain how to build dotnet/runtime, obtain CoreRun from the testhost folder, and run BenchmarkDotNet with the --coreRun argument to compare private builds.

assertions.name: mentions-corerun
assertions.description: Explains CoreRun as the mechanism for benchmarking private builds

assertions.name: mentions-build
assertions.description: References building the runtime

assertions.name: mentions-bdn
assertions.description: References BenchmarkDotNet for running the benchmarks

evals.name: existing-benchmarks-request
evals.prompt: Run the existing Regex benchmarks from dotnet/performance against PR https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/124628
evals.expected_output: Should use @MihuBot benchmark command to run existing benchmarks from the dotnet/performance repo rather than writing custom benchmark code.

assertions.name: uses-mihubot-benchmark
assertions.description: Uses MihuBot's benchmark command for existing benchmarks

assertions.name: references-perf-repo
assertions.description: References the dotnet/performance repository

evals.name: cross-release-regression
evals.prompt: A user reports that string.IndexOf is 2x slower in .NET 10 compared to .NET 9. How should we investigate?
evals.expected_output: Should explain how to identify the bisect range for cross-release regressions using git merge-base, create a standalone benchmark, and validate the regression. Should reference both local investigation and bot-based approaches.

assertions.name: mentions-merge-base
assertions.description: Explains using git merge-base for cross-release bisection

assertions.name: mentions-benchmark-creation
assertions.description: Suggests creating a benchmark for the reported scenario

assertions.name: mentions-bisect
assertions.description: References git bisect as part of the investigation

evals.name: compare-specific-commits
evals.prompt: Compare the performance of commits abc1234 and def5678 for the System.Text.Json benchmarks
evals.expected_output: Should invoke @EgorBot with -commits to compare the two specific commits, or use @MihuBot benchmark with a compare URL.

assertions.name: uses-commits-flag
assertions.description: Uses the -commits option or compare URL to specify the commits

assertions.name: invokes-bot
assertions.description: Invokes EgorBot or MihuBot to run the comparison

evals.name: not-applicable-bug-issue
evals.prompt: Can you check the performance impact of https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/issues/46088
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this is a functional bug (System.Text.Json does not support constructors with byref parameters), not a performance issue. Should indicate that performance benchmarking is not applicable here.

assertions.name: identifies-not-perf
assertions.description: Recognizes this is not a performance issue

evals.name: not-applicable-doc-pr
evals.prompt: Benchmark the changes in PR https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/124592 to validate performance
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this is a documentation-only PR (adding XML docs to DI extension methods) and that benchmarking is not applicable or meaningful for documentation changes.

assertions.name: identifies-doc-only
assertions.description: Recognizes this is a documentation/non-functional change where benchmarking is not meaningful
